See Your Scores

One scan. A complete aesthetic profile.

Your face is graded across symmetry, jawline, skin and proportion against thousands of data points. No vague advice — just precise numbers and the actions that move them.

Clinical-grade landmark detection
Benchmarked against your age group
Privacy-first — scans stay yours

AI Facial Analysis

A single photo maps 68 landmarks and decodes your face the way a clinician would — in seconds, not appointments.

Facial Symmetry Score

Quantify the balance between both halves of your face and see exactly where harmony breaks down.

Jawline Score

Measure gonial angle, definition and ramus length to benchmark the most-noticed feature on your face.

Skin Analysis

Detect texture, tone, clarity and hydration, then receive a routine engineered for your skin — not the algorithm.

Personalized Plan

Your scores become a structured 90-day protocol covering every lever that moves your appearance.

Habit Tracking

Mewing, training, skincare and sleep — small daily inputs compound into a face you recognize.

Progress Tracking

Re-scan weekly and watch your scores climb with side-by-side evidence of how far you have come.

Notifications & Daily Tasks

Intelligent reminders keep your protocol on autopilot so consistency stops being a question of motivation.

Grounded in Anatomy

Real science. Visible results.

Every recommendation traces back to the anatomy beneath your skin — so you train the right structures, the right way.

Facial Structure

The face, decoded

Bone, soft tissue and proportion analyzed in three dimensions to reveal what truly drives perceived attractiveness.

Jaw & Mandible

Engineer a model jawline

See the gonial angle, masseter and tongue posture that define a sharp lower third — then train the exact structures that take you there.

Asmetry, Holistically

Five levers. One refined you.

Looks aren't one thing. We optimize the full system — face, skin, nutrition, sleep and posture — for a result that compounds.

Jawline & Mewing

Proper tongue posture, mewing technique and targeted work for a sharper, more defined jawline.

Skin Optimization

Routines and habits for clear, even, luminous skin.

Nutrition

Eat for collagen, leanness and a defined face.

Sleep Optimization

Deep, restorative sleep is the foundation of recovery and a rested, vibrant appearance.

Posture

Stand taller and align your frame so confidence reads before you say a word.

Inside the App

Designed like the future of self-improvement

Every screen is engineered for clarity — so the path from scan to transformation feels effortless.
